messages.content: Summarize this article comprehensively: {{1.`0`}}, while considering my notes here if available: {{1.`1`}}

Your task: Create a tweet that has two parts: 1. an intelligent summary of the key insight from this article {{22.choices[].message.content}} which also incorporate my own thoughts, notes, and tone of voice here: {{1.`1`}}, and 2. the bitly link to the article itself: {{23.link}}

Overall count of characters including the two parts should NOT exceed 250 characters. It needs to be below 250 characters or else I'll be hurt. Do NOT repeat the link, it should only be present once. Use only a max of 2 hashtags, and use them before the link.

Output ONLY the tweet and nothing else.

Your output should NOT include double quotations at the start and the end.
